title: Canopy Growth Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Canopy Growth achieved consolidated gross margins of 36% in Q3 FY2024, with Canada cannabis gross margins increasing to 28% in Q3 FY2024, up from negative 11% in Q3 FY2023. Canadian medical cannabis generated record net revenue in Q3 FY2024, with revenue increasing 11% compared to the prior year. The company achieved a third quarter of sequential revenue growth across Canada cannabis businesses. Canopy achieved tremendous progress in the transformation of its Canadian cannabis business, with margin expansion and sequential growth demonstrating the effectiveness of the business model improvements.
